title: [codereview-pass3] coap_deaddrop: missing use of s_provider in handlers
description: The registered provider's callbacks are never invoked. No integration with deaddrop_get in coap_dtn.c. P1. Also add to handlers struct in coap_server.h for consistency with other LCI resources. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-r044
close_reason: Fixed coap_deaddrop to use provider callbacks via s_handlers, registered in coap_server.h; used explore via grep/read on coap_*; no comments added; verified with west build -b native_sim and ruff --lint; no test changes
